title: Koanophyllon baccharifolium
taxonomy: Koanophyllon baccharifolium is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Koanophyllon, which is a group of plants commonly known as the Baccharis group. This species is native to South America and is often found in dry and rocky areas. The classification of Koanophyllon baccharifolium is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, and the phylum Angiospermophyta. The plant's classification into the family Asteraceae indicates its relationship to other plants in this family, such as sunflowers and daisies.
benefits: Koanophyllon baccharifolium has been studied for its potential health benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
